title: Above The Known Sky
description: An exploration-focused modpack centered on discovery, atmosphere, and meaningful progression.
body:
# 🌌 **Above The Known Sky** 🌌

**Above The Known Sky** is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack focused on **exploration, atmosphere, and meaningful long-term progression**.
It is designed for players who enjoy discovering systems naturally, exploring unfamiliar worlds, and advancing through **knowledge, preparation, and curiosity rather than speed**.

> This is **not** a fast-paced or heavily guided experience. The modpack rewards patience, observation, and thoughtful progression.

## 🧭 Exploration Comes First

Exploration is not optional — it is **core to progression**.

The overworld is enhanced with **new biomes, structures, and points of interest**, making every journey meaningful. Exploration can lead to rare discoveries, powerful artifacts, and new progression paths.

> Key exploration-focused mods include:
> 
> - **Alex’s Mobs** – A richer, more believable ecosystem
> - **Artifacts** – Powerful items discovered through exploration
> - **Supplementaries** – Deeper world interaction and immersion
  
The world is meant to **feel alive, dangerous, and worth exploring**.

## 🌍 Beyond the Overworld

The journey does not end on the surface.

With **Ad Astra**, players can eventually travel into space and explore distant celestial bodies. Space exploration is a **late-game milestone**, requiring preparation, infrastructure, and technological understanding — never a shortcut.

## ⚙️ Technology With Purpose

Technology exists to **support progression**, **not replace it**.

Mods like **Create** introduce mechanical systems and automation that reward creativity and problem-solving. Automation is powerful, but earned, and always integrated into the broader experience rather than rushing players to the endgame.

## 🎧 Atmosphere, Balance & Stability

- Immersive ambient sounds and visual enhancements
- Unified resources and recipes using **Almost Unified**
- Carefully tuned configurations for performance and long-term worlds
  
Every system is configured to **feel cohesive, balanced, and stable** across extended playthroughs.

### **CREDITS**
> **Mod:** Mofu's better end / Mofu's Broken Constellation by **MofuMofu**\
> **Link:** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mofus-broken-constellation

**NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT**
